decisions.decision: Always team mode — even single tasks spawn one agent
decisions.rationale: Executor is the only execution entry point. Removes mode decision complexity and eliminates serial code paths.

decisions.decision: Existing serial runs continue as-is; new runs always use team mode
decisions.rationale: Backward compatibility: delivery_run.py still accepts mode='serial' on load but create_delivery_run defaults to 'team'.
Executor spawns implementers. No direct implementation path needed.

constraints: Existing delivery runs with mode=serial must remain loadable
All tests must pass after changes
